g.text: Product Launches : we implemented devsecops to implement product launches from IC Approval to go live. originally took 3 to 4 months, the max achieved as of Nov 2022 is 3 weeks.

g.text: Home grown Life Insurance web app for end to end quote, binding products,we started with 8 and as of Nov 2022, we have launched 39 products.
